invariant: Daily readiness, meeting briefing, entity detail, dashboard render data, and MCP output agree on shared current-state claims for the same account, meeting, project, person, and open loop, or expose the same timestamped/degraded state.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = normalized field-level values for primary account, eligible meeting count, health/risk, project status, current-state claim ids, source_asof, produced/generated timestamp, and trust band match across get_entity_context, prepare_meeting, get_daily_readiness, dashboard render data, and MCP after policy redaction; lint-blocked and stale/degraded claims never render confidently elsewhere; refresh_completed activity-log state is followed by post-refresh reads. FAIL = any surface silently disagrees on the shared current-state story, daily and readiness meeting counts derive from different eligibility sets, MCP reports a different Tauri value outside an explicit redaction carve-out, or bundle-15 is not mandatory.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds account-b15-example with domain example.com, customer meeting meeting-b15-example, project-b15-example, person-b15-example, four eligible meetings, active current-state claims, one lint-blocked bleed claim, and an activity-log refresh_completed event.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pins a provider completion that attempts no divergence so field-level assertions are determined by the substrate oracle.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Pins dashboard eligibility, source freshness, MCP bridge policy, and refresh-completion state for the same fixture subjects.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Stores the DOS-290 normalized field-level matrix across get_entity_context, prepare_meeting, get_daily_readiness, dashboard render data, and MCP response.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Asserts source_asof, produced/generated timestamp visibility, field attribution, child composition, MCP bridge surface, and shared degraded posture.
fixture_design_notes.expected_state: Asserts post-refresh state, lint-blocked render policy across all surfaces, and no confident rendering of a blocked claim.
